name: Stockpile Relic
description: A basic Eridian relic that expands your carried ammunition, and sometimes your grenade capacity as well. It is most useful on ammo-hungry builds that chew through reserves faster than normal.
notes:
It can increase carrying capacity for up to three ammo types, and some versions also raise your maximum grenades.

Its ammo-focused role overlaps with Blood of the Ancients, which trades some of that utility for added health.

special.description: Raises ammo capacity for one or more ammo types, and some rolls also increase maximum grenade capacity.
